mnemonics: My Experiments Yield Significant Results (M.Y.S.R. - Myers)
Remember ANOVA (Raymond H's Noble Analytical Variance Observations)
keyPoints: Pioneered the use of response surface methodology (RSM) for process optimization
Co-author of the influential textbook 'Response Surface Methodology: Process and Product Optimization Using Designed Experiments'
Emphasized the importance of designed experiments over one-factor-at-a-time (OFAT) approaches
commonMistakes: Confusing his work with Ronald Fisher's foundational ANOVA concepts
Assuming RSM is only for physical processes and not applicable to computer science experiments (e.g., algorithm parameter tuning)
Overlooking the iterative nature of RSM, treating it as a single-step process
